articles.title: BLOCKCHAIN ASSOCIATION SAYS SEC HAS COST CRYPTO INDUSTRY $400 MILLION SINCE GENSLER BECAME CHAIR
articles.summary: The Blockchain Association's member firms have collectively spent ~$400M defending against SEC enforcement actions since Gary Gensler became chair. A recent survey found that 2/3rds of U.S. voters believe the SEC should wait for clearer regulatory guidelines from Congress before pursuing further crypto enforcement actions.

articles.title: IMMUTABLE RECEIVES SEC WELLS NOTICE
articles.summary: Immutable has received a Wells Notice from the SEC, joining the ranks of other crypto-focused companies facing regulatory actions from the agency, which many argue is increasingly stifling innovation by enforcing penalties over providing policy guidance. Committed to advocating for digital ownership, Immutable, confident in the transformative potential of blockchain for gaming and beyond, plans to challenge the SEC's move.

articles.title: MORPH LAUNCHES MAINNET
articles.summary: Morph's mainnet provides a user-friendly, consumer-focused blockchain platform that features robust scalability, low-cost transactions, and a complete ecosystem to support developers, with exchanges, funding, and marketing resources to drive mainstream adoption.

articles.title: RABBY CONTINUES TO ENABLE A CROSS-CHAIN FUTURE
articles.summary: Rabby Wallet continues to simplify cross-chain experiences by offering unified multi-chain portfolio tracking, seamless cross-chain dApp usage, and a single GasAccount for multi-chain gas payments. These innovations allow users to manage their portfolios, switch between dApps without interruptions, and pay gas fees in USDT/USDC across networks.

articles.title: MERIT-BASED ICO PLATFORM PUTS AN END TO LOW-FLOAT HIGH-FDV LAUNCHES
articles.summary: Legion gives crypto users merit-based access to ICOs and early fundraising rounds.

articles.title: 15 CRYPTO TOOLS FOR USE
articles.summary: This list highlights 15 lesser-known crypto tools, mostly free, for portfolio management, project discovery, on-chain data tracking, real-time whale alerts, smart contract risk analysis, and L2 analytics

articles.title: VARIANT'S DEMO NIGHT FOR CRYPTO X AI PROJECTS
articles.summary: Variant recently showcased innovative Crypto x AI tools, including Coinbase's Based Agent for onchain interactions, Livepeer's AI video editing, and AI Wayfinder's natural language smart contract creation. Other highlights included Getaxal's automated notifications, Nous Research's World Sim for customized web experiences, and Sage, a smart contract search tool.

articles.title: HARRIS WIN UNLIKELY TO ROCK BITCOIN PRICE, BUT CRYPTO FEARS PERSIST, SAY OBSERVERS
articles.summary: A potential Kamala Harris win raises concerns for the crypto industry because of her association with the Biden administration's perceived anti-crypto stance. This could lead to some temporary market dips and regulatory uncertainty. However, some analysts believe her administration will be taking charge during a period of increased liquidity, potentially benefiting the crypto industry.

articles.title: GLOW POSTS A RECORD $3.4M IN REVENUE IN ONE DAY, AND ANNOUNCES A $30M RAISE
articles.summary: Framework Ventures has co-led a $30 million investment in Glow, a blockchain-based platform aimed at decentralizing the energy grid by incentivizing solar energy production with cryptocurrency. Glow's protocol will reward solar farms with tokens, support large-scale solar projects initially in India, and leverage DePIN principles to drive global infrastructure growth.

articles.title: HYPOTHETICAL AAVE APP REDESIGN
articles.summary: Aave introduced a new visual identity a few weeks back - this post highlights mock-ups for a hypothetical Aave app redesign.

articles.title: POLYGON TRANSITIONS BACK INTO A PRODUCT ORIENTED ORGANIZATION
articles.summary: Polygon has shifted from a research-focused approach over the past two years back toward long-term product development, user experience, and go-to-market strategies.

articles.title: FRANKLIN TEMPLETON BRINGS $410M TREASURY FUND TO COINBASE'S LAYER-2 BASE
articles.summary: Franklin Templeton's tokenized U.S. Government Money Market Fund, FOBXX, is now available on Coinbase's Base.

articles.title: FUNDING UNISWAP WALLET VIA VENMO
articles.summary: Uniswap has introduced a new feature that allows users to purchase crypto directly with their Venmo balance via MoonPay.
